summary: Comprehensive testing of Operations features v2: MoveInOut two-tab layout, cleaning records backfill with Next Check-in column, and all related backend APIs. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features working correctly. Smoke test of main navigation sections passed.

console_warnings.issue: React warning: Each child in a list should have unique key prop in TableBody - minor, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: MoveInOutPage correctly implements two-tab layout with Move-Ins (4 items) and Move-Outs (7 items) tabs
Backend /api/move-ins-outs returns flat array; frontend correctly filters by move_in_date and move_out_date >= today
HousekeepingPage has 'NEXT CHECK IN' column showing next tenant moving into same unit
Cleaning records backfill logic works - auto-creates records for tenants with move-out in date range
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Operations nav group in sidebar correctly expands to show Move In/Out and Housekeeping sub-items
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_operations_v2.py (created new test suite for Operations v2 features)
seed_data_creation: Existing data: 7 tenants across 2 properties, 1 housekeeper (Maria), 1 housekeeping lead (John), 4 cleaning records with next check-in data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operations features fully tested. MoveInOutPage now has two tabs (Move-Ins and Move-Outs) instead of previous two-table layout. HousekeepingPage Upcoming Cleanings tab displays 'Next Check In' column showing the next tenant scheduled to move into each unit. Backend auto-backfills cleaning records for tenants with upcoming move-outs. Test data: 4 upcoming move-ins, 7 upcoming move-outs, 4 cleaning records, 1 housekeeper (Maria), 1 housekeeping lead (John).

move_in_out_two_tab_layout.notes: Page shows two tabs: 'Move-Ins' (4 items) and 'Move-Outs' (7 items), each with badge counts

move_ins_tab_content.notes: Shows tenants with upcoming move-in dates, sorted by date, with green highlighted move-in dates

move_outs_tab_content.notes: Shows tenants with upcoming move-out dates, sorted by date, with orange/red highlighted move-out dates

move_in_out_data_enrichment.notes: Each row shows property_name/unit_number, tenant name, dates, notes, bell icon for reminders

backend_move_ins_outs_endpoint.notes: GET /api/move-ins-outs returns flat list with property_name and unit_number enrichment

cleaning_records_backfill.notes: Backend auto-creates cleaning records for tenants with move-out in date range who don't have records

next_check_in_column.notes: Upcoming Cleanings table has 'NEXT CHECK IN' column showing date and tenant name of next move-in

cleaning_records_api.notes: GET /api/cleaning-records returns records with next_check_in_date, next_check_in_tenant_name fields

housekeeping_page_three_tabs.notes: Page has 3 tabs: Upcoming Cleanings (default), Current Housekeepers, Housekeeping Leads

housekeepers_crud.notes: List, create, update, archive, delete all working for housekeepers

housekeeping_leads_crud.notes: List, create, update, archive, delete all working for housekeeping leads

operations_nav_group.notes: Operations group in sidebar expands to show Move In/Out and Housekeeping sub-items

smoke_test_main_sections.notes: Properties, Units, Tenants, Leads, Notifications all load without errors
